meta.title: Ask AI About PDFs With Source References | AskPDF
meta.description: Manage and read contracts, manuals, proposals, and research PDFs in one screen. Answers include references for fast verification.

hero.title: Ask AI About PDFs With Citations
hero.subtitle: Manage, read, and question contracts, manuals, proposals, and papers in a single workspace.

trustLine: AskPDF helps teams and students handle everyday PDF work faster and with more confidence.
pains: It takes too long to find where key information lives in a PDF.
AI answers without visible evidence still require manual verification.
Switching between PDF viewers and AI tools breaks your workflow.
solutionPoints: Each answer includes references so you can verify the source instantly.
Manage PDFs and ask questions in one screen without tool switching.
Start free and scale to Plus when your usage grows.

featureDetails.title: PDF Management
featureDetails.description: Organize files in a list and access documents quickly. Folder support is planned.

featureDetails.title: PDF Viewing
featureDetails.description: Read smoothly with highlights and underlines directly inside the viewer.

featureDetails.title: Tabs
featureDetails.description: Switch PDFs quickly with top tabs. Opened files are optimized for faster re-display.

featureDetails.title: Annotation Minimap
featureDetails.description: Jump to annotated locations with one click from the minimap.

featureDetails.title: Chat
featureDetails.description: Ask AI about your PDF with source references and use multiple chats per file.

featureDetails.title: PDF Search
featureDetails.description: Search within document body text to find important passages faster.

featureDetails.title: OCR
featureDetails.description: Works with image PDFs and handwritten documents for chat, search, and highlights.

featureDetails.title: Shortcuts
featureDetails.description: Use keyboard shortcuts across core actions for a faster daily workflow.

steps.title: Upload PDFs
steps.description: Analyze multiple documents at the same time.

steps.title: Ask Questions
steps.description: Type what you want to know in chat.

steps.title: Verify Evidence
steps.description: Review answers and references side by side.

comparisonRows.askPdf: Jump from answer to exact section

comparisonRows.legacy: Handwritten/image PDFs are hard to process
comparisonRows.askPdf: Handwritten and image PDFs are supported

faqs.question: What kinds of PDFs are supported?
faqs.answer: Contracts, internal docs, manuals, proposals, papers, and more.

faqs.question: Can I verify answer sources?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can review linked references while reading each answer.

faqs.question: Can I try it for free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Start with the Free plan and upgrade to Plus anytime.

faqs.question: How is uploaded data handled?
faqs.answer: Uploaded PDFs and usage data are tied to your account and can be deleted from settings.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can change or cancel your plan at any time from settings.

footer.note: Start with the free plan, then switch to Plus when it fits your workflow.
